passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：chain
PDF 定位/解析：第二段"Thetraditional liftingmechanismisalonglengthofchainrunningupthehillunderthetrack."这里明确说明提升装置的主 体是一条链条，示意图中14指向由许多环节组成的条状物，对应chain。

题目 15
答案：gear
PDF 定位/解析：同段..woundaroundagearatthetopofthehillandanotheroneatthebottom."图中15指向带齿的圆轮，对应gear。

题目 16
答案：motor
PDF 定位/解析：同段"Thegearatthebottomofthehillisturnedbyamotor."放大图黑色方形箱体即为驱动电机。

items.text:
题目 14
答案：chain
PDF 定位/解析：第二段"Thetraditional liftingmechanismisalonglengthofchainrunningupthehillunderthetrack."这里明确说明提升装置的主 体是一条链条，示意图中14指向由许多环节组成的条状物，对应chain。

questionSections.text:
题目 17
答案：ice
PDF 定位/解析："Their direct ancestors were ice slides,popular in Russia... with a surface of ice."（首段"Coasting through history"部分首句)

题目 18
答案：waxed
PDF 定位/解析："the warmer climate would melt the ice, so the French started building waxed slides instead."

题目 19
答案：wheels
PDF 定位/解析："To help the sleds move down these slides, they added wheels..."

题目 20
答案：coal
PDF 定位/解析：*..built in the mountains of Pennsylvania ..to send coal to the railway 29 km down the mountain."

题目 21
答案：steam engines
PDF 定位/解析："They were eventually replaced with steam engines to make the system more efficient."

items.text:
题目 17
答案：ice
PDF 定位/解析："Their direct ancestors were ice slides,popular in Russia... with a surface of ice."（首段"Coasting through history"部分首句)

questionSections.text:
题目 22
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位/解析：法国的确首先对原始滑道做出改良：加蜡、加轮子、加车厢；见第二段首句。

题目 23
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位/解析：1920年代火热，但文中说"adecline...beganintheearly1930s"。持续增长并未贯穿1930年代。

题目 24
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位/解析：文中只说1970-80年代出现第二次热潮和"innovativetubularsteelcoasters"，并未说明是"响应公众需求"。

题目 25
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位/解析："Thiswasfollowedbyadeclineininterestfortherestofthedecade"指1980年代大部分时间兴趣下降；70年代和90 年代均为热潮。

题目 26
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位/解析："Newlaunchingtechniques...opened upaworld of options fordesigners"→90年代设计更加多样，故为TRUE。
